title: aegilops peregrina var. multiaristata
intro: Aegilops peregrina var. multiaristata, also known as a type of wild goat grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aegilops peregrina var. multiaristata are believed to include the reduction of inflammation, improvement of digestion, and support of immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its potential health benefits.
